codeReview.summary: The fix commit fully addresses the prior onboarding bypass. `ui/src/components/OnboardingWizard.tsx` now derives the highest reachable step from created onboarding state (`:162-166`), clamps any over-advanced step back down (`:205-208`), and only allows or enables progress-tab navigation when the requested step is reachable (`:718-722`). Combined with the existing `handleStep3Next`/`handleLaunch` guards (`:558-565`), failed `codex_local` validation no longer lets operators reach Task or Launch without a created agent. The added regression in `ui/src/components/OnboardingWizard.test.tsx:232-252` directly covers the original clickable-tab bypass. I did not find any new blocking or non-blocking defects in this focused fix.

summary: Pass. The reviewed fix closes the prior blocking issue from `web-onboarding-codex-launch-flow`: failed adapter validation now blocks all onboarding progression paths, including clickable progress tabs, and regression coverage explicitly proves Task/Launch stay inaccessible after a failed codex readiness check.
